title: potentilla nivea var. uniflora
intro: Potentilla nivea var. uniflora, also known as the single-flowered snow gentian, is a plant species belonging to the Rosaceae family. It is used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anthelmintic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which help to expel intestinal parasites, reduce swelling and pain, and prevent infections. The health benefits of Potentilla nivea var. uniflora include its ability to support the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
